summary: Frontend-only testing of CompileRenderPage component. All major features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Stage badge displays raw 'intake_needs_review' string with underscores instead of human-readable 'Intake Needs Review'
data-testid for Render executor brief step is 'pipeline-step-render-brief' not 'pipeline-step-render' as documented in test spec

issues: Dark workbench UI looks correct and professional. All layout, spacing, contrast appear good.

action_items: Consider formatting badge text: 'intake_needs_review' → 'Intake Needs Review' for better UX
Update test spec: pipeline step for 'Render executor brief' uses data-testid 'pipeline-step-render-brief' not 'pipeline-step-render'
critical_code_review_comments: Badge shows raw snake_case status 'intake_needs_review' - consider a formatter to display human-readable label
context_for_next_testing_agent: Component is CompileRenderPage.js. All pipeline steps, inspector tabs, blocker card, and artifacts sections work correctly. Minor: badge text is raw snake_case. data-testid for render step is 'pipeline-step-render-brief'.
passed_tests: Blocker card 'Prepare is blocked' with amber styling
Return to Intake Review button present
All 6 pipeline steps present (compile, packet-validation, repair, render-brief, brief-validation, approval)
Inspector panel has 4 tabs: DETAILS, ARTIFACTS, VALIDATION, LOGS
ARTIFACTS tab shows 'No artifacts generated yet.'
VALIDATION tab shows 'No validation data available. Compile must run first.'
LOGS tab shows 'No logs available yet.'
DETAILS tab has 5 sections: RUN STATE, COMPILED PACKET, REPAIR, EXECUTOR BRIEF, APPROVAL
Stage tabs: Intake, Compile/Render (active), Execute, Audit all present
